name: Clean invoice
notes: All configured deterministic rules pass or are not applicable.

name: Duplicate invoice
notes: Duplicate and previous-payment rules fail against the paid ledger.

name: Vendor bank-account mismatch
notes: Submitted bank account differs from approved vendor master; verification is required.

name: Missing vendor
notes: Vendor identity cannot be established from approved vendor master.

name: Missing supporting evidence
notes: Invoice is above the supporting-evidence threshold and has no accepted supporting document.
